results.title: Rays beat the Nationals 5-2 to open a 10-game homestand
results.description: Jonathan Aranda hit a three-run home run, Griffin Jax allowed two runs in five innings and the Tampa Bay Rays beat the Washington Nationals 5-2 on Friday night to open a 10-game homestand. Tampa Bay, coming off a 1-5 trip...

results.title: Jacob Misiorowski tagged for 2 runs by Mauricio Dubón and Braves beat Brewers 3-2
results.description: Jacob Misiorowski lost for the first time in two months as the Atlanta Braves scored two runs against the Milwaukee Brewers' ace and Mike Yastrzemski hit a home run in a 3-2 victory.

results.description: Jon Rahm recorded a double bogey and seven bogeys while making a precipitous fall in the second round of the U.S. Open with an 8-over-par 78 on Friday
